context: TypeScript project with no .claude/bruhs.json. ls .claude/bruhs.json returns nothing.
expected_behavior: Step 0 detects the missing config and fires AskUserQuestion with header 'Config' offering 'Run /bruhs:claim (Recommended)' and 'Continue without config'
If user picks 'Run /bruhs:claim', hands off to the claim workflow first, then resumes cook

If user picks 'Continue without config', skips all Linear-related steps (no ticket lookup, no ticketContext), uses sensible defaults for stack detection, and continues to Step 1 treating the input as a feature description
Reminds the user at the end of Step 7 that they can run /bruhs:claim later to enable full features
failure_modes: Crashes when trying to read the missing .claude/bruhs.json instead of catching the ENOENT and prompting
Fabricates a default Linear mcpServer name and attempts Linear ticket operations anyway
Silently proceeds without the AskUserQuestion, hiding the fact that config is missing
